data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional slicing by location and source type.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for optional slicing by location and source type, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The prior step evidence does not address the specific requirement of slicing, leading to an inconclusive result. Without direct evidence of how the API handles this slicing, it is impossible to assert that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks for optional slicing by location and source type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the optional slicing by location and source type.
